filosofia.lead: MetodologIA is born from the premise that every person and organization can systematize their success with the right tools and an evidence-based process.

diagnostico.lead: The first step is to measure. Our diagnosis evaluates maturity, pain and urgency to generate an actionable profile.
diagnostico.card_body: We evaluate five key dimensions: methodological maturity, operational pain level, urgency of change, team composition and market segment. The result is a radar profile with prioritized recommendations.

estrategia.lead: Route design with clear priorities, measurable milestones and allocated resources.
estrategia.card_body: With the diagnosis in hand, we create a personalized action plan. Clear priorities, measurable milestones and allocated resources so that each step brings you closer to digital, professional and strategic sovereignty.

amplificacion.title: Scale what works
amplificacion.lead: Automation, applied AI and knowledge transfer to the team.
amplificacion.card_body: We scale what works: automation of repetitive tasks, AI applied to decision-making and knowledge transfer so the team is autonomous and sustainable.

pivote.title: Pivot with agility
pivote.lead: When data indicates a change of direction, we pivot without losing what was built.
pivote.card_body: Data rules. When metrics indicate a change of direction, we pivot with agility without losing what was built. Each iteration preserves learnings and redirects energy toward what generates the greatest impact.

evidencia.lead: Every decision is backed by real metrics. We show results, not promises.
evidencia.card_body: Our commitment is to the facts. Every recommendation is backed by verifiable metrics, industry benchmarks and results from real cases. Total transparency at every step of the process.

siguiente.lead: Ready to start? Take your no-risk diagnosis and receive a personalized action plan.

vision.title: Who We Are
vision.lead: Strategists co-creating environments of abundance. We close the gap between intentions and results by designing systems that work for you. MetodologIA was born from the shared vision of four strategists committed to empowering professionals and organizations through the strategic integration of Artificial Intelligence and high-performance methodologies.

equipo.title: Our Team
equipo.lead: A team of strategists dedicated to co-creating environments where excellence and innovation meet.

ecosistema.lead: We connect technology, academia, and business.
ecosistema.body: Authorized partners, resellers, and an elite community to power the (r)evolution. We act as Customer Success for our allies. Every node in the network amplifies the impact of the entire ecosystem.

mision.title: Purpose & PIVOTE
mision.lead: Close the gap between the infinite potential of technology and the limited capacity of people.
mision.body: We don't believe in AI magic; we believe in the systematic design of operating systems that (r)evolutionize the way we work. Deontology, Ikigai, and the relentless pursuit of excellence guide every decision. The PIVOTE framework structures our execution: Purpose, Investigation, Validation, Operation, Transformation, Evolution.

valores.v3_desc: We're not vendors, we're growth partners. Excellence in execution is our differentiator.

privacidad.title: Privacy Policy
privacidad.subtitle: Local-First architecture, data sovereignty, total transparency.
privacidad.body: Our tools and resources operate under a Local-First architecture. Your data is stored in your browser (localStorage / IndexedDB), not on our servers. You have full control. We don't have a central user database, we don't sell your data, we don't use tracking cookies, and we don't train models with your data.

terminos.title: Terms of Service
terminos.subtitle: Terms of use for the MetodologIA platform.
terminos.body: By accessing and using metodologia.info, you accept these terms. Educational content, diagnostic tools, and resources available on the platform are provided for informational and educational purposes. MetodologIA reserves the right to modify or discontinue any service without prior notice. All content, trademarks, logos, and original material are protected under Colombian intellectual property law.

cookies.title: Cookie Policy
cookies.subtitle: How we use cookies and local storage.
cookies.body: We use essential cookies for site operation: mdg_consent (analytics consent, 180 days), mdg_returning (SHA-256 of email after diagnosis, 180 days), and local storage for theme, language, and audience preferences (mdg_theme, mdg_locale, mdg_audience). Google Analytics 4 only activates with your explicit consent. You can use tracking blockers or incognito mode without affecting your experience.

datos.title: Data Processing
datos.subtitle: What data we collect and why.
datos.body: We collect voluntary data: name, email, and message if you choose to contact us; diagnostic data (answers and results) with explicit consent; and anonymized GA4 metrics (country, pages visited, site performance). Diagnostic data is stored in Firebase Firestore with anonymous authentication and append-only security rules. We never store card data or share information with third parties for commercial purposes.

derechos.title: Your Rights (Habeas Data)
derechos.subtitle: Rights under Colombian Law 1581 of 2012.
derechos.body: You have the right to know, update, rectify, delete, and revoke your personal data. Access to your data is No-Risk. To exercise these rights, write to contacto@metodologia.info. Maximum response time: 10 business days (inquiries) or 15 business days (complaints). Responsible: MetodologIA / Javier Montaño.

cambios.title: Changes to these Policies
cambios.subtitle: How we inform you of updates.
cambios.body: We may update these policies periodically. Changes will be published on this page with the corresponding update date. We recommend reviewing this page occasionally to stay informed.

contacto.title: Legal Contact
contacto.subtitle: Official channel for privacy and data inquiries.
contacto.body: For any inquiry about privacy, data processing, or exercise of rights, contact the Privacy Officer:

err.title: Page not found
err.body: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or was moved. Go back to the homepage and explore everything MetodologIA has for you.

hero.title: Method + Technology = Sovereignty
hero.description: Spoiler alert: Technology without method is just speed in the wrong direction. We design systems for Digital, Professional and Strategic Sovereignty.

problema.title: The Operational Fracture
problema.subtitle: "Chaos" is not bad luck. It's a design flaw in your work system.

card1.title: Chronic Multitasking
card1.desc: The silent killer of strategic depth. Each interruption costs 23 minutes of refocus.

card2.title: Repetitive Friction
card2.desc: Zombie tasks that drain senior talent. Your most valuable team spends 4 hours a day on copy-paste.

card3.title: Information Silos
card3.desc: Knowledge trapped in chats, emails and heads. When someone leaves, they take everything.

card4.title: Cosmetic AI
card4.desc: Powerful tools, broken processes. Buying software doesn't fix a behavior problem.

trampa.title: Chaos + AI = Chaos²
trampa.description:
Technology is an amplifier.
If your process is solid, it scales it.
If your process is garbage, it scales the garbage.
trampa.quote: "Believing that buying software will fix a behavior problem."

sistema.title: The 4 Phases of Sovereignty
sistema.subtitle: From reactive chaos to strategic design. Each phase builds on the previous one.

f1.title: GROUND
f1.desc: We map pains, flows and real opportunities. No assumptions — only measurable evidence.

f2.title: ACCELERATE
f2.desc: We eliminate friction and activate quick wins. The team feels the change in weeks, not months.

f3.title: CATALYZE
f3.desc: We turn tacit knowledge into replicable digital assets. Playbooks, templates, agents.

f4.title: AMPLIFY
f4.desc: MetodologIA agents work 24/7 for you. You design, they execute.

pivote.title: Framework P.I.V.O.T.E.
pivote.subtitle: Human First, AI Next. We clean the signal before amplifying it. Every decision is evaluated in this order — technology is always second to last.

p.title: People
p.desc: Mindset, roles and capabilities. Who decides, who executes, who learns?

i.title: Interactions
i.desc: Flows, friction and dependencies. Where is time, energy and context lost?

v.title: Value
v.desc: Measurable real impact. Which activities generate ROI and which are noise?

o.title: Organization
o.desc: Systematization and structure. Playbooks, SOPs and living knowledge base.

t.title: Technology
t.desc: Automation and AI. Only after cleaning the signal do we amplify it.

e.title: Evolution
e.desc: Continuous improvement. Metrics, retrospectives and data-driven pivoting.

metodo.title: First order, then the tool.
metodo.desc: If the process is broken, AI only scales the chaos. A clear method turns AI into leverage.

soberania.title: I finish when you no longer need me.
soberania.desc: We build installed capacity, not dependency. Every engagement transfers explicit knowledge.

dignidad.title: Performance doesn't justify burnout.
dignidad.desc: Productivity without wellbeing is disguised exploitation. We design cadences with sustainable rhythm.

evidencia.title: Without data, there's no truth.
evidencia.desc: Everything we claim has a measurable before and after. CSAT, ROI, TTFW, Lead Time.

resultado.title: The destination: Strategic Sovereignty
resultado.subtitle: From reactive operator to impact designer. The systems work for you.

card1.title: Free strategic hours
card1.desc: Intelligent automation so your talent focuses on what matters.

card2.title: Exponential growth
card2.desc: Without increasing fixed costs. Agents multiply your delivery capacity.

card3.title: Antifragile organization
card3.desc: That learns continuously. Knowledge never leaves with people.

contacto.title: Let's Accelerate your Strategy
contacto.lead: No risk, no friction. 60 minutes to connect your pains and goals with real possibilities.
